---
execute: 
  echo: false
---

Information for Newton GenX Schoolboys Football Club

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)

# Calculate next Saturday (or today if Saturday)
next_saturday <- today() |>
  (\(d) if (wday(d, week_start = 1) == 6) d else d + days(6 - wday(d, week_start = 1)))()

# Format the date to match the page format, e.g. "Saturday March 21, 2026"
target_date <- next_saturday |>
  format("%A %B %d, %Y") |>
  str_replace(" 0", " ")

# Function to fetch and filter reservations for a given field URL
get_reservations <- \(url) {
  read_html(url) |>
    html_table() |>
    keep(\(tbl) "Date" %in% names(tbl)) |>
    first() |>
    filter(Date == target_date)
}

# Define the two fields
fields <- tribble(
  ~name,            ~url,
  "Brandeis Field", "https://newtonma.myrec.com/info/facilities/area_info.aspx?FacilityID=15013&AreaID=15160",
  "Stadium Field",  "https://newtonma.myrec.com/info/facilities/area_info.aspx?FacilityID=15013&AreaID=15034"
)

# Print reservations for each field
cat("Field reservations for", target_date, "\n\n")

fields |>
  pwalk(\(name, url) {
    reservations <- get_reservations(url)
    cat(name, ":\n")
    if (is.null(reservations) || nrow(reservations) == 0) {
      cat("  No reservations found.\n\n")
    } else {
      reservations |>
        select(Event, Time) |>
        pwalk(\(Event, Time) cat("  ", Event, " | ", Time, "\n"))
      cat("\n")
    }
  })
```
